General.Name: China Kingstone Mining Holdings Ltd
General.Description: China Kingstone Mining Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the mining, processing, and trading of marble stones and marble-related products in the People's Republic of China and the United Kingdom. It operates through two segments, Marble Slag and Food Brand. The company offers beige marble slabs and blocks, marble slags, and other by-products. It also owns and operates the Zhangjiaba Mine, located in Zhenjiang Village, Xiangshui County, Jiangyou City of Sichuan Province. It is also involved in preparing and delivering food for distribution to consumers through virtual restaurants under the Celeplate, Burgogi Korean BBQ Burger and Ya brands, as well as through its website, celeplate.co.uk. In addition, the company offers ready-to-cook meal kits, such as sashimi and seafood, meat and wagyu, BBQ and hotpot, oven-ready Peking duck, and other fresh meat and seafood. Further, it engages in the processing and trading of construction materials; food brand franchise business. China Kingstone Mining Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
